---
name: Ticket
about: Describe one implementation task
title: ""
labels: ["needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🧾 Title
<!-- Short, actionable title: "Do X" -->

## 🧠 Summary
<!-- Explain what needs to be done and why. Include background/context. -->

## 📦 Scope
<!-- What is included in this work. Be specific about what this issue will deliver. -->

## 🚫 Out of Scope
<!-- Explicitly list what is NOT included, to avoid scope creep. -->

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Checklist of what must be true for this issue to be considered complete. -->
- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## 🧪 Testing / Validation
<!-- How this should be tested or validated (manual steps, scripts, etc.). -->
- [ ]

## 🧰 Implementation Notes
<!-- Optional: technical notes, suggested approach, important details for the implementer. -->

## 🧰 Notes / Links
<!-- Any extra notes, docs, links, or blockers. -->

## ✅ Addendum: Bugs Found/Fixed
<!-- Post-ticket creation extras that still fit inside the initial scope but were unforeseen like minor bug fixes during the ticket -->

## ⏳ Addendum: Pending
<!-- Anything still pending that might fit inside this scope, but we're either not doing or needs its own ticket (link it after creation of the ticket) -->
